title: Tag Claude in, right where you already work
summary: Anthropic announced Claude Tag, a beta feature allowing teams to invoke Claude directly in Slack channels. Claude Tag maintains channel context and organizational tool integrations, persists across multi-day workflows, and can be summoned via mention in any thread to execute tasks and return results.
writeup: Anthropic's video covers Claude Tag, a feature that lets Claude be summoned with @Claude inside Slack channels. Once tagged, Claude reads channel context, connects to organizational tools, and keeps persistence across conversations rather than treating each mention as isolated. The capability ships in beta and is limited to Team and Enterprise plans.
